svg.title: PMFBY Fasal Suraksha — System Architecture Diagram
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture showing a farmer submitting a claim via PWA, processed through FastAPI backend with EXIF metadata, Speech-to-Text, and Gemini AI services, producing a structured NCIP JSON payload for human assessors.

g.text: Camera photo · voice note · policy number
